title: PlanReviewDecideInput
description: INPUT of `plan_review_decide`: the Pass-1 finder findings (from the batch step), the Pass-2 verifier verifications, and the DET-floor findings to merge.

findings.description: Pass-1 finder findings (the batch step's `findings` output).

det_blocking.description: DET-floor blocking findings to merge (from the precheck).

det_advisory.description: DET-floor advisory findings to merge (from the precheck).

review_phase.description: Lifecycle phase selecting the fixed execution floor.
